response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile senior engineer with genuine geospatial experience (founder of the GISCollective geo-data platform, FOSS4G speaker) and proven low-latency systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, that systems work was in DLang, not the required modern C++ or Rust — his only professional C++ stint was a seven-month role in 2014-2015 — and his recent years are dominated by TypeScript/Node.js product work. He has no routing, navigation guidance, or map-tile pipeline experience, so he would face a steep ramp on the role's core stack despite strong adjacent fundamentals.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial/GIS domain experience through GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience (async I/O, caching, fibers) at Sociomantic
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, Linux and Docker fluency
concerns: Modern C++/Rust requirement unmet — last professional C++ work was ~2015 and brief
No experience with routing engines, navigation guidance, or map-tile production pipelines
Recent career trajectory (TypeScript/Node full-stack, pricing, AI tooling) diverges from systems-level pipeline engineering
